response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates extensive experience as a Senior Fullstack Engineer with over 10 years of relevant work, including leadership roles at Naver and Tencent. His technical stack aligns closely with the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and secondary technologies (Kotlin/Java), and he has deep expertise in cloud platforms, databases, and testing frameworks. His contributions to AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling further strengthen his fit. However, his recent role at Naver may limit availability, and his experience with Vitest (primary stack) is not explicitly mentioned.
strengths: Extensive fullstack experience (10+ years) with a strong track record in TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Proven leadership and architectural contributions in large-scale systems (e.g., Naver, Tencent, MercadoLibre)
Diverse technical expertise including AI-agent infrastructure, cloud platforms, and testing frameworks
concerns: Recent employment at Naver (April 2025–present) may limit immediate availability
Vitest experience is not explicitly mentioned, though he has strong testing framework expertise (Jest, Playwright)
No direct mention of Nest.js, a primary stack requirement, though he uses Node.js and TypeScript

key_factors.factor: Fullstack experience and primary stack alignment
